The '''Battle of Antar 4''' was a skirmish between the [[Antarian Rangers/Legends|Antarian Rangers]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
[[File:LordsoftheSith-Dookupointinghilt.png|thumb|left|250px|Count Dooku (pictured) had Antar 4 bombarded.]]
[[Gotal Assembly for Separation/Legends|Separatist loyalists]] clashed with the Antarian Rangers, who held order on the planet after the [[Battle of Antar 4 (Separatist Crisis)|Battle of Antar 4]] of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombarded]] the planet, decimating the Rangers and allowing him to conquer it and set up a new command headquarters there.

{{Battle-stub}}
